# Phase 4 StepControl oracle (wolframscript triangulation).
# Cross-validates capture.jl (TI.jl) and capture.py (mpmath/sympy)

# Case 4.1.1 -- (eps * k!)^(1/k) for k in {29, 30}, eps = 1e-12.
# Source: Mathematica N[..., 50] from the consensus formula.
h_4_1_1_at_29_wl = 4.5012063703389861
h_4_1_1_at_30_wl = 4.7950006365905668
h_4_1_1_min_wl   = 4.5012063703389861
h_4_1_1_min_wl_50dps = "4.50120637033898607690318848315848021108523516609"

# Case 4.1.3 -- roots of Q(z) = 1 - z/2.
# roots: {2.}
step_4_1_3_expected_wl = 2.0

# Case 4.1.4 -- roots of Q(z) = 1 - 0.6 z + 0.1 z^2.
# roots: {3. - 1. I, 3. + 1. I}
step_4_1_4_expected_wl = 3.0
